
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dragon|kanji=戊辰|romaji=tsuchinoe tatsu|onyomi=bo shin|p=wùchén|w=wu-ch'en|mi=u⁵⁵ ʈ͡ʂʰən³⁵|y=mou6 san4|j=mou6 san4|ci=mɐu sɐn²|mc=məu ɖin|oc-bs=mə ɖiŋ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dragon also known as  ''Earth Dragon''''' is the 5th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}} of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|en|Chinese zodiac|qid=Q1976204|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Chinese zodiac}}. 

It is the fifth of the Chinese zodiac combinations, the previous being Ding-U and the next being Ji-snake. The dragon (龍) is the only fictional animal in the zodiac. In the Yin-Yang Five Elements, Boshi in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=the ten signs of the zodiac|1=Heavenly Stems}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|qid=Q3199973|lt=Earth|1=Soil (disambiguation)}}, {{ill|Dragon (zodiac)|en|Dragon (zodiac)|qid=Q731434|lt=Dragon|1=Dragon (zodiac)}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=the twelve signs of the zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}} is Yang {{ill|Soil (disambiguation)|en|Soil (disambiguation)|qid=Q3199973|lt=Earth|1=Soil (disambiguation)}} {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Hiwa|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, which is {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Hiwa|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dragon (戊辰)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùchén
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tatsu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tatsu
***Onyomi 1: boshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): mujin (무진)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thìn

==Years of Yang Earth Dragon==
The year in which the Western year is divided by 60 and the number 8 is left over is the year of Earth Dragon.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Associated years'''
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st millenium|1=1st millennium}}
!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd millenium|1=2nd millennium}}
!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd millenium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 8|en|AD 8|qid=Q23348|lt=8|1=AD 8}}
* {{ill|AD 68|en|AD 68|qid=Q23507|lt=68|1=AD 68}}
* {{ill|AD 128|en|AD 128|qid=Q30297|lt=128|1=AD 128}}
* {{ill|188|en|188|qid=Q30574|lt=188|1=188}}
* {{ill|248|en|248|qid=Q32674|lt=248|1=248}}
* {{ill|308|en|308|qid=Q32336|lt=308|1=308}}
* {{ill|368|en|368|qid=Q48000|lt=368|1=368}}
* {{ill|428|en|428|qid=Q30902|lt=428|1=428}}
* {{ill|488|en|488|qid=Q31811|lt=488|1=488}}
* {{ill|548|en|548|qid=Q30904|lt=548|1=548}}
* {{ill|608|en|608|qid=Q31037|lt=608|1=608}}
* {{ill|668|en|668|qid=Q30116|lt=668|1=668}}
* {{ill|728|en|728|qid=Q23560|lt=728|1=728}}
* {{ill|788|en|788|qid=Q30721|lt=788|1=788}}
* {{ill|848|en|848|qid=Q30380|lt=848|1=848}}
* {{ill|908|en|908|qid=Q30463|lt=908|1=908}}
* {{ill|968|en|968|qid=Q23918|lt=968|1=968}}
|
* {{ill|1028|en|1028|qid=Q19273|lt=1028|1=1028}}
* {{ill|1088|en|1088|qid=Q19463|lt=1088|1=1088}}
* {{ill|1148|en|1148|qid=Q19633|lt=1148|1=1148}}
* {{ill|1208|en|1208|qid=Q5238|lt=1208|1=1208}}
* {{ill|1268|en|1268|qid=Q5520|lt=1268|1=1268}}
* {{ill|1328|en|1328|qid=Q5802|lt=1328|1=1328}}
* {{ill|1388|en|1388|qid=Q6365|lt=1388|1=1388}}
* {{ill|1448|en|1448|qid=Q6439|lt=1448|1=1448}}
* {{ill|1508|en|1508|qid=Q6170|lt=1508|1=1508}}
* {{ill|1568|en|1568|qid=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}}
* {{ill|1628|en|1628|qid=Q6840|lt=1628|1=1628}}
* {{ill|1688|en|1688|qid=Q7671|lt=1688|1=1688}}
* {{ill|1748|en|1748|qid=Q7600|lt=1748|1=1748}}
* {{ill|1808|en|1808|qid=Q6914|lt=1808|1=1808}}
* {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}}
* {{ill|1928|en|1928|qid=Q19715|lt=1928|1=1928}}
* {{ill|1988|en|1988|qid=Q2426|lt=1988|1=1988}}
|
* {{ill|AD 2048|en|AD 2048|qid=Q49923|lt=2048|1=AD 2048}}
* [[:en:2108|2108]]
* {{ill|22nd century|en|22nd century|qid=Q11177|lt=2168|1=22nd century}}
* {{ill|23rd century|en|23rd century|qid=Q49832|lt=2228|1=23rd century}}
* {{ill|23rd century|en|23rd century|qid=Q49832|lt=2288|1=23rd century}}
* 2348
* 2408
* 2468
* 2528
* 2588
* 2648
* 2708
* 2768
* 2828
* 2888
* 2948
|}

=== Events ===

* In 1868 the {{ill|Boshin War|en|Boshin War|qid=Q309184|lt=Boshin War|1=Boshin War}} occurred marking the beginning of the [[Meiji Restoration]]

*
==Months of Yang Earth Dragon==

* {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}
* {{In title|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|戊辰|qq=Yang Earth Dragon|version=84123735|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q118701|af|Aarddraak (astrologie)|cdo|Muô-sìng|de|Erde-Drache|en|Earth Dragon (Chinese Zodiac)|fr|Dragon de terre|hak|Vú-sìn|ja|戊辰|ko|무진 (간지)|nds|Eer-Draken|vi|Mậu Thìn|za|Fouhsaenz|zh-min-nan|Bō͘-sîn|zh-yue|戊辰|zh|戊辰|zh-min-nan|Bó͘-chîn|cdo|Tsuch-cṳ̄de|nds|Erd-Drachteen|de|Yang Earth Dragon|en|Earth Dragon|af|Aardedraak (astrologie)|de|Erde-Drachteen|fr|Dragon de terreboishak|it|Tsu-chṳ́id|za|Mouzceij|ar|Yang Earth Dragon}}
[[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
